title: Constant expression in generated block index not recognized

features.name: genvar loop creating module instance array
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a for loop using genvar to create an array of module instances
features.snippet:
genvar g;
generate for (g = 0; g < 4; g = g + 1) begin: inst_arr bar i_bar(); end endgenerate

features.name: constant expression index to generated instance array
features.description: Code should include using an arithmetic constant expression as an index to access a generated module instance array

features.name: dotted reference through indexed generated instance
features.description: Code should include a dotted reference accessing a signal through a generated module instance that is indexed by a constant expression
